body.title: Commit 2 stranded decision-rollup .md files (D-announce + T-igor-programs-himself)
body.description:
cc_queue.py _decision_rollup writes per-decision rollup files into lab/design_docs/decisions/ as a side effect of the last ticket of a decision closing. Two such files were left untracked from prior sessions: D-announce-protocol-2026-05-01.md (rollup appended after slice 4b shipped) and T-igor-programs-himself.md (cc-walk 1-10 rollup). Bundling them into the test-fix commit window so they don't keep lingering as untracked.

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/decisions/D-announce-protocol-2026-05-01.md, lab/design_docs/decisions/T-igor-programs-himself.md.

**Design rules:** every-change-has-a-ticket (this is the bystander ticket per /sprint-batch step 9).

**Scope boundary:** IN — commit the two stranded rollup files. OUT — fixing the underlying race that leaves rollups untracked (file under T-rollup-autocommit if that ever becomes a recurring annoyance).
